$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete. Runtime behavior is driven by configVersion, not this URL.

configVersion.description: md-utils config schema version. This is independent from the md-utils CLI version.

schemaDirectory.description: Directory where JSON Schema files are stored. Relative paths are resolved from the project root.

rules.description: Rules that decide which checks apply to which Markdown files.

name.description: Unique rule name used by md-utils rules validate <rule-name>.

ruleMatch.description: A file matches this rule only when all configured match groups pass: path includes, path excludes, file metadata predicates, frontmatter predicates, whole-frontmatter query predicates, and document predicates. The paths array is any-of; excludePaths is none-of; predicate namespaces are all-of. Logical grouping predicates all/any/not are deferred to config schema 0.3.0.

paths.description: Any-of glob patterns matched against project-relative Markdown file paths. If present, a file path must match at least one pattern.

excludePaths.description: None-of glob patterns checked after paths match. If a file path matches any exclude pattern, the rule is skipped.

frontmatter.description: All-of frontmatter field matchers. Each key is a frontmatter key, and every configured key matcher must pass. Missing keys do not match value inequality; only doesntHaveKey intentionally matches a missing key.

fileMatcher.description: All-of project-relative path and file metadata predicates evaluated before file contents are parsed.

pathRegex.description: Matches when the project-relative path matches this Swift NSRegularExpression pattern.

filenameEquals.description: Matches when the basename, including extension, equals this string.

extensionIn.description: Matches when the file extension without leading dot is in this list. Comparison is case-insensitive.

modifiedAfter.description: Matches when the filesystem modification date is after this date or date-time. Date-only operands compare at date precision; RFC 3339 date-time operands compare at date-time precision.

modifiedBefore.description: Matches when the filesystem modification date is before this date or date-time. Date-only operands compare at date precision; RFC 3339 date-time operands compare at date-time precision.

frontmatterQueryMatcher.description: Whole-frontmatter predicates. These are ANDed with field-level frontmatter predicates when both are present.

jmespath.description: JMESPath expression evaluated against parsed frontmatter. Truthiness matches md-utils fm search: non-empty strings, arrays, and objects are true; true is true; false, null, and empty values are false.

documentMatcher.description: All-of Markdown body predicates. hasBrokenWikilink is intentionally deferred until resolver context and performance behavior are designed.

hasHeading.description: Matches when the Markdown body has an ATX heading with this exact text.

headingRegex.description: Matches when any ATX heading text matches this Swift NSRegularExpression pattern.

hasSection.description: Matches when the body has an ATX heading with this exact text and non-empty section content before the next same-or-higher-level heading.

bodyContains.description: Matches when the raw Markdown body contains this substring.

bodyRegex.description: Matches when the raw Markdown body matches this Swift NSRegularExpression pattern.

hasWikilink.description: Matches when the body has any wikilink if true, or a wikilink with the configured target when a string is provided.

headingAtLevelMatcher.description: Matches an exact ATX heading text at one configured heading level.

countRange.description: Inclusive integer range. At least one of min or max is required; when both are present min must be less than or equal to max.

frontmatterMatcher.description: Predicates for one frontmatter key. If multiple operators are specified, all operators must pass. Missing keys do not match value predicates, including doesntEqual, notIncludes, and notIn; only doesntHaveKey matches a missing key.

equals.description: Matches when the existing frontmatter value equals this JSON-compatible value.

doesntEqual.description: Matches when the key exists and its value does not equal this JSON-compatible value. Missing keys do not match.

includes.description: Matches when the existing frontmatter value is an array containing this JSON-compatible value.

notIncludes.description: Matches when the key exists, its value is an array, and the array does not contain this JSON-compatible value. Missing keys do not match.

hasKey.description: Matches when the frontmatter object contains this key.

doesntHaveKey.description: Matches when the frontmatter object does not contain this key. This is the only frontmatter field predicate that intentionally matches absence.

regex.description: Matches when the existing value is a string matching this Swift NSRegularExpression pattern.

startsWith.description: Matches when the existing value is a string starting with this prefix.

endsWith.description: Matches when the existing value is a string ending with this suffix.

contains.description: Matches when the existing value is a string containing this substring. Use includes for array membership.

empty.description: Matches when the existing value is an empty string, empty array, or empty object.

emptyString.description: Matches when the existing value is exactly an empty string.

emptyArray.description: Matches when the existing value is an empty array.

emptyObject.description: Matches when the existing value is an empty object.

notEmpty.description: Matches when the existing value is not an empty string, empty array, or empty object.

in.description: Matches when the existing scalar value equals one item in this array.

notIn.description: Matches when the key exists and the scalar value equals none of the items in this array. Missing keys do not match.

greaterThan.description: Matches when the existing numeric value is greater than this number.

greaterThanOrEqual.description: Matches when the existing numeric value is greater than or equal to this number.

lessThan.description: Matches when the existing numeric value is less than this number.

lessThanOrEqual.description: Matches when the existing numeric value is less than or equal to this number.

after.description: Matches when the existing date/date-time value is after this operand using precision-aware comparison.

onOrAfter.description: Matches when the existing date/date-time value is on or after this operand using precision-aware comparison.

before.description: Matches when the existing date/date-time value is before this operand using precision-aware comparison.

onOrBefore.description: Matches when the existing date/date-time value is on or before this operand using precision-aware comparison.

between.description: Inclusive range. Numeric bounds compare numbers; date/date-time bounds use precision-aware comparison.

typeIs.description: Matches when the existing value has this JSON/YAML type.

dateTimeLiteral.description: Date-only YYYY-MM-DD or RFC 3339 date-time with Z or numeric offset. Date-only operands compare at date precision. Date-time operands compare at date-time precision. A value with more precision can match a less precise rule; a value with less precision does not match a more precise rule.

betweenRange.description: Inclusive range. from and to must both be numbers or both be date/time literals; from must be less than or equal to to.
